courses.name: Java Full Stack Development
courses.mentorBio: Ex-Amazon Senior Engineer specializing in high-performance Java systems.
courses.syllabus: [{"module":"Module 1: Core Java Programming","details":"OOP principles, Collections Framework, Exception Handling, Multithreading & Stream API.","recordingUrl":"https://www.w3schools.com/html/mov_bbb.mp4"},{"module":"Module 2: Advanced Java & Database","details":"JDBC, MySQL foundations, Hibernate ORM, and database connection pools.","recordingUrl":"https://www.w3schools.com/html/movie.mp4"},{"module":"Module 3: Enterprise Spring Framework","details":"Spring Core, Spring Boot, Spring Data JPA, and RESTful Microservices.","recordingUrl":"https://www.w3schools.com/html/mov_bbb.mp4"},{"module":"Module 4: Frontend Integration","details":"HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript ES6, and connecting React frontends with Spring Boot.","recordingUrl":"https://www.w3schools.com/html/movie.mp4"},{"module":"Module 5: Testing, Security & Cloud","details":"JUnit testing, Spring Security, JWT, Docker, and AWS deployment.","recordingUrl":"https://www.w3schools.com/html/mov_bbb.mp4"}]
courses.faqs: [{"q":"Are there any prerequisites for this course?","a":"No, this course starts completely from scratch. Basic programming familiarity is helpful but not mandatory."},{"q":"Is there a placement assistance guarantee?","a":"Yes! We offer extensive mock interview sessions, resume polishing, and referrals with 500+ corporate hiring partners."}]

courses.name: Frontend Development (React & Next.js)
courses.mentorBio: UI Architect focused on rendering optimization, custom animations, Framer Motion, and design systems.
courses.syllabus: [{"module":"Module 1: UI Core & Layouts","details":"Semantic HTML5, CSS Flexbox & Grid, Responsive Design, and Tailwind CSS.","recordingUrl":"https://www.w3schools.com/html/mov_bbb.mp4"},{"module":"Module 2: Modern JavaScript (ES6+)","details":"DOM manipulation, Asynchronous programming, Fetch API, and Functional structures.","recordingUrl":"https://www.w3schools.com/html/movie.mp4"},{"module":"Module 3: Deep React Foundations","details":"Virtual DOM, JSX, State & Props, Custom Hooks, Context API, and State Managers.","recordingUrl":"https://www.w3schools.com/html/mov_bbb.mp4"},{"module":"Module 4: Modern Production Next.js","details":"App Router, Server Actions, SSR vs SSG, Routing, SEO optimization, and Image components.","recordingUrl":"https://www.w3schools.com/html/movie.mp4"}]
courses.faqs: [{"q":"Will I build real projects?","a":"Absolutely! You will build 6 real-world web applications including a premium e-commerce portal and a SaaS dashboard."}]

courses.name: AI & Machine Learning Engineering
courses.mentorExp: Ph.D. in AI, ex-Google Brain Scientist
courses.mentorBio: Researcher focused on NLP transformer models, generative architectures, and scaling neural network computing parameters.
courses.syllabus: [{"module":"Module 1: Mathematical Foundations","details":"Calculus optimization, Gradient Descent, Vector Calculus, and Probability."},{"module":"Module 2: Deep Learning & Neural Networks","details":"Perceptrons, Backpropagation, MLP, and TensorFlow/PyTorch ecosystems."},{"module":"Module 3: Computer Vision (CV)","details":"CNNs, Image Segmentation, OpenCV, YOLO model object detection."},{"module":"Module 4: Natural Language Processing (NLP)","details":"LSTMs, Transformers, Attention mechanism, HuggingFace transformers, and LLM fine-tuning."}]
courses.faqs: [{"q":"Can I do this course part-time?","a":"Yes! All lectures are live-streamed on weekends and recorded in 4K resolution for asynchronous self-paced review."}]

courses.name: AWS Solutions Architect
courses.mentorExp: 8+ Years Exp at Adobe & AWS Mentor
courses.mentorBio: UI & Cloud Architect focused on elastic solutions models and server infrastructure.
courses.syllabus: [{"module":"Module 1: Cloud Principles","details":"Introduction to AWS global compute systems, regions, Availability Zones, and IAM policies."},{"module":"Module 2: Virtual Server Compute & Elastic IP","details":"Configuring EC2 machines, Elastic Block Storage, and load balancing routers."},{"module":"Module 3: Virtual Networks & Subnets","details":"Configuring private subnets, security groups, route tables, and VPC architectures."},{"module":"Module 4: Relational Databases & Cache","details":"Deploying Amazon RDS databases, DynamoDB documents databases, and ElastiCache."}]
courses.faqs: [{"q":"Is exam fee included?","a":"No, the official AWS Certification exam fee is billed separately. We provide exam preparation quizzes and referrals."}]

courses.name: PMP Certification
courses.mentorBio: Ex-Director specializing in high-throughput project management frameworks.
courses.syllabus: [{"module":"Module 1: Professional Project Frameworks","details":"Project Lifecycle management, Agile integrations, and Business environments mappings."},{"module":"Module 2: People and Teams Management","details":"Leadership traits, conflict resolutions, virtual teams management, and KPI targets."},{"module":"Module 3: Project Processes & Controls","details":"Scheduling baselines, budget tracking, risk response protocols, and quality audits."}]
courses.faqs: [{"q":"Does this course provide PDUs?","a":"Yes! This course gives you the official 35 Contact Hours/PDUs certificates required to sit for the PMP exam."}]

courses.name: Certified ScrumMaster (CSM)
courses.mentorBio: Product owner and trainer focused on Scrum agile frameworks and release sprints.
courses.syllabus: [{"module":"Module 1: Scrum Values & Ceremonies","details":"Scrum core values, Sprint planning, Daily Standups, Sprint Review, and Retrospectives."},{"module":"Module 2: Scrum Team Roles","details":"Scrum Master tasks, Product Owner parameters, and developers responsibilities."},{"module":"Module 3: Product Backlogs & Estimations","details":"User stories mapping, backlog refinement cycles, and story points estimation checks."}]
courses.faqs: [{"q":"Is Scrum Alliance fee included?","a":"Yes! The official Scrum Alliance certification fee and two exam attempts are fully covered in the tuition fee."}]

courses.name: Microsoft Azure Administrator
courses.mentorBio: Enterprise consultant specializing in hybrid cloud computing configurations and Active Directory rules.
courses.syllabus: [{"module":"Module 1: Azure Identities and Governance","details":"Configuring Azure Active Directory (AD), Role-Based Access Controls (RBAC), and subscriptions."},{"module":"Module 2: Manage Storage Solutions","details":"Blob storage configurations, Azure Files synchronization, and storage security check keys."},{"module":"Module 3: Azure Virtual Machines & Hosting","details":"Deploying VMs, virtual network subnets, Network Security Groups, and DNS routing."}]
courses.faqs: [{"q":"Which exam does this course prepare for?","a":"This course maps to the Microsoft AZ-104 certification exam curriculum."}]

courses.name: Data Science & AI Bootcamp
courses.mentorBio: Ex-Google Scientist focused on data engineering, database schemas, and AI algorithm analytics.
courses.syllabus: [{"module":"Module 1: Python for Data Analysis","details":"Numpy arrays, Pandas DataFrames, and Matplotlib data charts visualization."},{"module":"Module 2: Applied Statistics & Probability","details":"Hypothesis tests, Regression curves modeling, and probability metrics distributions."},{"module":"Module 3: Machine Learning & NLP","details":"Supervised learning (classification, decision trees) and LLM prompt engineering models."}]
courses.faqs: [{"q":"Do I need math background?","a":"Basic high-school algebra is helpful. We seed all mathematical formulas from scratch in Module 2."}]

courses.name: DevOps Engineer Program
courses.mentorBio: Senior Architect focused on automated integration pipelines, Kubernetes clustering, and Terraform configuration tools.
courses.syllabus: [{"module":"Module 1: Container Orchestration with Docker","details":"Writing Dockerfiles, managing networks, volumes, and composing multi-container layouts."},{"module":"Module 2: CI/CD Pipeline Automation","details":"Configuring Jenkins scripts, GitHub actions hooks, and automated build testing flows."},{"module":"Module 3: Infrastructure as Code (IaC)","details":"Deploying AWS servers, VPC networks, and route rules using Terraform states variables."}]
courses.faqs: [{"q":"Do we deploy to live servers?","a":"Yes! Learners deploy their homework configurations onto our private sandbox AWS testing servers."}]

trainers.name: Dr. Ramesh Kumar
trainers.bio: Ex-Amazon Senior Java Architect specializing in distributed web engineering.

trainers.name: Sarah D'Souza
trainers.bio: UI Architect focused on rendering optimization and custom animations.

leads.name: Esha Gupta
leads.notes: Called today, interested in AI course syllabus.

webinars.title: Mastering Generative AI & Large Language Models
webinars.description: Learn how to build and fine-tune enterprise LLMs from scratch.
webinars.speaker: Dr. Vivek Sharma

blogs.title: The Ultimate Next.js 15 App Router Migration Guide
blogs.content: Next.js 15 introduces dynamic improvements for server actions, styling caches, and compiling speeds. In this guide, we dive deep into how full-stack architects can upgrade existing apps seamlessly.

testimonials.name: Ananya Sharma
testimonials.quote: Got placed at Microsoft with 18 LPA. The intensive roadmap and 1-on-1 industry mock reviews completely changed my trajectory.

testimonials.name: Rohit Verma
testimonials.quote: Highly structure-driven syllabus. I came from a non-CS engineering background, and within 6 months, pivoted into data engineering.
